children.heading: Account
children.label: 1 Account
children.text: The term “account” means an agreement between an individual and an eligible entity under which the individual obtains from or through the entity 1 or more banking products and services, and includes a deposit account, a savings account (including a money market savings account), an account for a closed-end loan, and other products or services, as the Secretary deems appropriate.

children.heading: Community development financial institution
children.label: 2 Community development financial institution
children.text: The term “community development financial institution” has the same meaning as in .section 4702(5) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: an organization described in , and exempt from tax under section 501(a) of such title;section 501(c)(3) of title 26

children.label: D
children.text: a State, local, or tribal government entity; or

children.label: E
children.text: a partnership or other joint venture comprised of 1 or more of the entities described in subparagraphs (A) through (D), in accordance with regulations prescribed by the Secretary under this subchapter.

children.heading: Federally insured depository institution
children.label: 4 Federally insured depository institution
children.text: The term “federally insured depository institution” means any insured depository institution (as that term is defined in ) and any insured credit union (as that term is defined in ).section 1813 of this titlesection 1752 of this title
